title: Bien Hoa、Dong Nai — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Bien Hoa、Dong Nai的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Bien Hoa是Dong Nai的一个城市，人口约1,100,000。An industrial hub adjacent to Ho Chi Minh City, offering significantly lower housing costs while providing access to the economic opportunities of the greater metro area.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
